global_summary: This week's plan calls for 138 work-days, 107 due by today with only 27 earned and the lone scheduled start unbegun. Every project trails its weekly plan, echoing last week's all-missed Jul 6-12 run. Prioritize the rough-in and trim deadlines landing Fri-Sat this week.
